title: The Law of Skypiea Turns Against Them
description: The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Conis, Sanji, McKinley, Luffy, Nami. The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: That idiot....!! He still wants to go!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I just put down the ladder...

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Guys the best to see the

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of us take down luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: McKinley
dialogue.text: No, that's not it. I'm the sniper.

dialogue.speaker: McKinley
dialogue.text: Our ship doesn't have a carpenter, yet.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Yes, the placement's also an art!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: These Jade Green beans should be here...

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Now it looks even more delicious! <^

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Really!? This is for you, conis-chan! <3

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, something's wrong with the ship...

summary: The Going Merry and several crewmates are carried toward Upper Yard, turning Skypiea from a peaceful island into a survival trial.
